posts.text: Political historians cannot recall a Canadian prime minister winning a majority via a by-election in the past century. posts.text:
BREAKING: Iran's IRGC says an Israeli-linked vessel has been "stopped" in the Strait of Hormuz after being hit by a drone.

The ship is currently on fire.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: Farmer question:  Trying to open up the branch structure of an orange tree (pic 1). Trying bricks with twine as they allow me to adjust over time. Why is this better/worse than the stakes I used on my jackfruit (pic 2)?? Stakes are VERY sturdy, but cannot easily reposition. Thoughts??
posts.author: hkuppy
